title: Elytras+
description: Adds many new elytras - one for each dye colour, plus some specials.
body:
Elytras+ adds many brand-new elytras: one for each dye colour, _plus_ four special elytras...

...as well as some easter eggs! Collect them all.

 

They can be dyed in a regular crafting table; and the craftable special ones are all shapeless recipes (but require dye combinations!)

Some of the specials require an item rename, though...
